title: AN ACT MAKING THE BARRIO OF MATIPUNSO OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIAONG, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, A PART OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ANTONIO, SAME PROVINCE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3038 / 58 OG No. 23, 4271 (June 4, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3361, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT MAKING THE BARRIO OF MATIPUNSO OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIAONG, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, A PART OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ANTONIO, SAME PROVINCE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrio of Matipunso is hereby separated from the Municipality of Tiaong, Province of Quezon, and is consolidated with and made a part of the Municipality of San Antonio, same province.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
